segment: # One row per IDoc-segment field you want mapped to the target BAPI. Fill and pass to
#   segment       = IDoc segment type (e.g. E1MARAM) - must exist in the idoc type's tree
#   segment_field = the field inside that segment (e.g. MATNR)
#   target        = the BAPI parameter path it maps to (e.g. HEADDATA-MATERIAL)
#   rule          = MOVE | CONST | FIXED | SKIP   (MOVE = copy; CONST/FIXED = literal in sample_value; SKIP = ignore)
#   sample_value  = value used to seed the ABAP Unit test EDIDD (and the literal for CONST/FIXED)
#   note          = free text for the reviewer
